calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Continued To Jan-03-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for default judgment prove up hearing as to Defendant K& B Remodeling & Sons, Inc., and Defendant Yonis R. Hernandez.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:34:49 a.m. and concluding at 9:41:10 a.m.(D505)

Stuart Katz, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Can Capital Inc.
Defendant K& B Remodeling & Sons, Inc., and Defendant Yonis R. Hernandez not appearing.

Plaintiff's counsel informs the court that parties have filed with the court a written stipulation to vacate the default and to then dismiss the complaint subject to the court retaining jurisdiction over the case to enforce the settlement pursuant to CCP 664.6.

Good cause appearing, the Court grants and executes the proposed order. Signed and filed this day.

See Scanned order.

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Judgment as to Defendant K&B Remodeling & Sons Inc. and Defendant Yonis R. Hernandez.

Dept.505; Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:09 p.m. and concluding at 2:15 p.m.. (D505)

Stuart Katz, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Can Capital, Inc. on Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant K&B Remodeling & Sons Inc. not appearing.
Defendant Yonis R. Hernandez not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff requests the Court for a continuance as parties are engage in an ongoing settlement. Plaintiff to file a dismissal with the Court upon resolution of the settlement and to inform the department of the filing.

Plaintiff's request of a continuance is Granted.

The matter is continued to November 15, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2023 Continued To Nov-22-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
